docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SAPORITO,JAMES V. AS TO DEFENDANT STEVENS,GLORIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-26-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAPORITO,JAMES V. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT STEVENS,GLORIA INSUFFICIENT EVIDENCE OF CAUSE AND DATE OF INJURY RESULTING IN TREATMENT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
